creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This patch updates security/fakeroot to v1.12.5.

This is a minor update, targetted to Debian users. From Changelog :

fakeroot (1.12.5) :
  * Disable biarch support on amd64.  closes: #538037.
  * Bump to Standards-Version 3.8.2.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
